title: Hierarchy of Formal Languages and Automata
description: A flowchart depicting the containment relationships between different classes of formal languages and the automata that recognize them, as covered in Ullman's Theory of Computation.
relationships: Linear Bounded Automata recognize Context-Sensitive Languages
Turing Machines recognize Recursively Enumerable Languages
Regular Languages are a proper subset of Context-Free Languages
Context-Free Languages are a proper subset of Context-Sensitive Languages
Context-Sensitive Languages are a proper subset of Recursively Enumerable Languages
